name: Sakai Trading Co., Ltd.
summary: Sakai Trading Co., Ltd. engages in the import, export, manufacture, and sale of chemicals and related products in Japan and internationally. The company offers various chemicals, including titanium dioxide, zinc products, barium salts, resin stabilizers, catalysts, phenol derivatives, azo compounds, hydrazine derivatives, isocyanates, amines, polyethyleneimines, sebacic acids, phosphates, alginic acids, glucosamine, and chitin and chitosan; hygienic products, such as SAP, nonwoven fabrics, breathable and non-breathable films, loop and hook tapes, diaper tissues, laminated nonwoven fabrics, elastic nonwovens and films, and diapers. It also provides polyurethane resins, epoxy resins, phenoxy resins, acrylic resins, PET resins, polyvinyl chloride, polyolefins, polyamides, polyimides, copolyesters, chlorinated polyolefins, reflective sheets, and functional films; and electronic materials comprising perovskite compounds, PET and PI films, conductive pastes, silver powders, connectors, and barium and strontium carbonates, as well as binders for ceramics. In addition, the company offers mineral products and biomass ethanol that include ilmenite, barite, celestite, tungsten, vanadium, zirconium, and titanium slags; and industrial materials, which comprise sandbags, construction sheets, joint sealants, water stops, nets, weed proof and impervious sheets, and curing tapes. Sakai Trading Co., Ltd. was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Sakai Trading Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sakai Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
